body:
## Rationale

Lick pages are the **#1 proven GA4 format** on MetalForge (igor-cavalera lick pages are the 3rd and 4th highest-traffic routes after homepage and /drummers). Batches 1-4 are in progress (#2311 Greiner+Jordison, #2323 Hoglan/Lombardo/Haake, #2360 Flo/Inferno/Jaska, #2219 Menza+Reinert — all promoted to ai-fix).

**This batch** adds lick pages for 3 high-TAM drummers **NOT covered in any prior batch**:

### Lars Ulrich (Metallica)
3 licks:
1. `lars-ulrich-master-of-puppets-gallop` — The foundational thrash gallop pattern; pedagogically ubiquitous
2. `lars-ulrich-one-building-thrash` — Gradual intensity build from intro to double-bass finale
3. `lars-ulrich-blackened-open-hihat` — Driving open hi-hat thrash groove, classic Metallica

### Danny Carey (Tool)
3 licks:
1. `danny-carey-schism-odd-meter-groove` — 5/4 + 4/4 odd-time groove; highest-searched Tool drum pattern
2. `danny-carey-lateralus-polyrhythm` — 9-8-7-8 Fibonacci polyrhythm; most-cited math-rock drum concept
3. `danny-carey-forty-six-and-2-steady-groove` — 13/8 modular groove structure

### Brann Dailor (Mastodon)
3 licks:
1. `brann-dailor-blood-and-thunder-shuffle` — Swung quasi-blast groove, signature Mastodon
2. `brann-dailor-crack-the-skye-melodic-fill` — Progressive melodic fill over odd time; distinct from blast patterns
3. `brann-dailor-colony-of-birchmen-funky-groove` — Funk-influenced groove, shows range beyond metal

## Page count and quality gate

- **9 new lick pages** under `/drummers/[drummer]/licks/[lick-slug]`
- **3 LLM files updated** (one per drummer): `public/llms/licks/lars-ulrich.md`, `danny-carey.md`, `brann-dailor.md`
- Each lick page: ≥200 words, tab notation/description, gear context, related lick links
- FAQPage schema (2 Q&A per lick minimum), HowTo JSON-LD for technique description
- 3 internal links per page minimum

## Expected organic uplift

- Lars: "how to play master of puppets drum pattern" — major tutorial keyword cluster
- Danny: "tool schism drum pattern", "lateralus polyrhythm drums" — high-intent prog queries
- Brann: "mastodon blood and thunder drums", "brann dailor lick" — active GSC signal (Brann has L1 win)

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/lickData.js` (or equivalent) — add 3 licks per drummer (9 total entries)
- `public/llms/licks/lars-ulrich.md`, `danny-carey.md`, `brann-dailor.md` — update with new lick entries

## Verify
1. All 9 lick pages return HTTP 200
2. HowTo + FAQPage JSON-LD present on each page
3. LLM files updated with new lick data
4. Internal links between licks within same drummer work
5. GA4 events fire on lick page engagement (matches Igor lick page pattern)

## Done
9 lick pages live for Lars Ulrich, Danny Carey, Brann Dailor; 3 LLM files updated.
title: SEO batch: Lick pages batch 5 — Lars Ulrich + Danny Carey + Brann Dailor (~9 lick pages + 3 LLM file updates)
